flags.description: Master toggle for every write path (create, update, reparent, set-default, pause, resume, archive). Off = read-only mode. Emergency-only when a corruption bug threatens organizational data integrity.
SeedDefaultOrganizationForTenantJob dispatch on tenancy::TenantProvisioned. Off during migrations that pre-seed defaults out of band.
The POST /reparent endpoint. Off = every attempt returns 503 REPARENT_TEMPORARILY_UNAVAILABLE. Emergency when tree-drift issues are being investigated.

When on, RebuildTreePathsJob dispatches to the queue after ParentChanged. When off, the job runs SYNCHRONOUSLY in the same request as the reparent — slower response but zero eventual-consistency window. Use `off` during regression testing.
Nightly ReconcileDefaultOrganizationInvariantJob dispatch. Off during migrations that intentionally leave the invariant temporarily broken (e.g. mass tenant re-seed).

Whether logo_url + primary_color + secondary_color + description are writable. Off makes them read-only across the platform even for tenants holding the `organization_branding` entitlement — used during branding-audit rollouts.
The `org:tree:*` and `org:descendants:*` Redis caches. Off routes every scoped-access decision through the DB. Used to isolate cache-consistency bugs.
